user.title: Set up Update Manager
user.description: Update Manager applies local, semver-aware staging rules to your Home Assistant updates. Configure the details afterwards via Configure.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Update Manager is already set up. Only one instance is needed.

init.title: Choose a starting profile
init.description: A profile only fills in the settings on the next screen -- you can still change every value by hand afterwards, whichever profile you pick.

details.title: Staging rules
details.description: Update Manager doesn't install anything automatically yet -- these settings only control the status shown for each pending update (ready / waiting / needs review), so you know at a glance which ones are worth a look. "Always needs review" means it stays that way no matter how long the update has been available, until you decide by hand.

data.unknown_wait_days: Unrecognized version: days before shown as "ready"
